# Rule Name Status Source Zone Source Networks Destination Zone Destination Networks Service Action Web Filter Log IPS Application Control
1 Allow-Internet Enabled LAN Any WAN Any HTTPS Allow Default Policy Enabled GeneralPolicy AllowAll
2 Guest-Web Disabled DMZ GuestNet WAN Any HTTP Allow None Disabled None None
3 Internal-DNS Enabled LAN Any LAN DNS-Server DNS Allow Enabled
4 Open-WAN Enabled LAN Any WAN Any ANY Allow None Enabled None None
5 VPN-Access Enabled VPN VPNPool LAN ServerNet ANY Allow Enabled
6 Duplicate-WAN Enabled LAN Any WAN Any ANY Allow None Enabled None None
#Rule NameTypeSourceDestination
1Masquerade-LANMasqueradeLAN SubnetWAN
2DNAT-WebServerDNATAnyWebServer
ZoneType
LANLAN

otpWebAdmin
Enabled

Disabled
